San Andreas State Troopers.name: San Andreas State Troopers
San Andreas State Troopers.shortDesc: The San Andreas State Troopers ensures that everything is smoothly running safe and sound.
San Andreas State Troopers.missionStatement: The San Andreas State Troopers' mission is to save lives, safeguard freedom and liberty in the state of San Andreas, and protect those who are unable to defend themselves. Since we uphold a code of professionalism, decency, respect, and trust, our citizens can rely on us to be there for them when they need us. We are here to strengthen the relationship between residents and law enforcement agencies and to represent those agencies to the general public.
San Andreas State Troopers.ourVision: The San Andreas State Troopers is dedicated to offering security, justice, and professionalism to locals, visitors, and anyone else in the San Andreas state. All San Andreas State Trooper employees are expected to have a thorough understanding of all duties and State Patrol rules in order to successfully uphold this statement.

Blaine County Sheriff's Office.name: Blaine County Sheriff's Office
Blaine County Sheriff's Office.shortDesc: The Blaine County Sheriff's Office is the primary law enforcement agency in Blaine County.
Blaine County Sheriff's Office.missionStatement: The Blaine County Sheriff's Office is dedicated to protecting the lives, property, and rights of all people, to maintaining order, and to enforcing the law. We will accomplish this by providing quality police services and enforcing laws with equality and impartiality. We will work in partnership with the community and other public service agencies to enhance the quality of life in our county.
Blaine County Sheriff's Office.ourVision: The Blaine County Sheriff's Office is dedicated to offering security, justice, and professionalism to locals, visitors, and anyone else in the Blaine County. All Blaine County Sheriff's Office employees are expected to have a thorough understanding of all duties and Sheriff's Office rules in order to successfully uphold this statement.

Los Santos Police Department.name: Los Santos Police Department
Los Santos Police Department.shortDesc: The Los Santos Police Department is the primary law enforcement agency in Los Santos.
Los Santos Police Department.missionStatement: The Los Santos Police Department is committed to providing professional, effective, and efficient law enforcement services to the residents and visitors of Los Santos. We are dedicated to protecting life, property, and the rights of all individuals, and to maintaining order and public safety. We strive to build positive relationships with the community, to prevent crime, and to promote a safe and secure environment for all. Our mission is to uphold the law, to serve with integrity and respect, and to enhance the quality of life in Los Santos.
Los Santos Police Department.ourVision: The Los Santos Police Department envisions a community where everyone is safe, secure, and treated with dignity and respect. We aim to be a leader in law enforcement, setting the standard for excellence, professionalism, and innovation. By working collaboratively with the community and other public safety agencies, we seek to prevent crime, solve problems, and improve the quality of life in Los Santos. Our vision is to create a safer, stronger, and more vibrant community through our commitment to service, integrity, and excellence.

San Andreas Fire And Rescue.name: San Andreas Fire And Rescue
San Andreas Fire And Rescue.shortDesc: The San Andreas Fire & Rescue is the primary fire and rescue service in San Andreas.
San Andreas Fire And Rescue.missionStatement: The San Andreas Fire & Rescue is dedicated to saving lives, protecting property, and promoting public safety. We are committed to providing the highest level of emergency response services to the residents and visitors of San Andreas. Our mission is to prevent and minimize the loss of life and property through fire suppression, emergency medical services, and public education. We strive to maintain a safe and healthy community by responding to emergencies with professionalism, compassion, and integrity.
San Andreas Fire And Rescue.ourVision: The San Andreas Fire & Rescue envisions a community where everyone is safe, healthy, and prepared for emergencies. We aim to be a leader in fire and emergency services, setting the standard for excellence, innovation, and professionalism. By investing in training, technology, and community partnerships, we seek to enhance the quality of life in San Andreas and ensure the well-being of its residents. Our vision is to create a safer, stronger, and more resilient community through our commitment to service, integrity, and excellence.

Certified Civilian.name: Certified Civilian
Certified Civilian.shortDesc: Certified Civilians are the backbone of the community.
Certified Civilian.missionStatement: The mission of Certified Civilians is to actively contribute to the well-being and development of the community. They play a vital role in supporting law enforcement agencies and ensuring the safety and security of the residents. Certified Civilians are committed to upholding the values of professionalism, integrity, and service. They strive to build positive relationships with the community and provide assistance in various capacities, such as administrative tasks, event coordination, and community outreach. By actively engaging with the community and promoting a sense of unity, Certified Civilians contribute to the overall success and growth of the community.
Certified Civilian.ourVision: The Certified Civilians strive to create a safe and inclusive community where everyone can thrive. We envision a place where individuals can actively contribute to the well-being and development of the community, fostering positive relationships and promoting unity. By upholding the values of professionalism, integrity, and service, we aim to make a lasting impact and contribute to the overall success and growth of the community.

Staff Team.name: Staff Team
Staff Team.shortDesc: Staff Members are the defenders of the community.

Development Team.name: Development Team
Development Team.shortDesc: The Development Team is a group that operates to improve the server experience.

Event Team.name: Event Team
Event Team.shortDesc: The Event Team makes the server poppin!

Support Team.name: Support Team
Support Team.shortDesc: The Support Team is a group of individuals that share the common goal of helping members of our community with any questions or concerns they may have.

Appeals Team.name: Appeals Team
Appeals Team.shortDesc: The Appeals Team makes sure our community is top notch with the best Roleplayers!

Chat Moderation.name: Chat Moderation
Chat Moderation.shortDesc: Chat Moderation makes sure that our chats are active and safe.
